name: Gotham City RPG
description:
"Gotham's air reeks of toxins as the innocent rot away and become...lesser for more"
-------
You've unfortunately found yourself in the hellish city called Gotham! 
Will the rapid outbreak of the landscape's madness crush you or will you learn to survive and thrive on the chaos?

After all who wouldn't want to live in the worst city on earth?
-------
Enjoy the angsty pit which is Gotham, go wild! o7
This is my first RPG and I put a lot of effort into it ,but if there is any bugs to it please notify me in the reviews ^-^)~<3
-------
If the stats don't show up, just roll with it. I've tried so hard to get them to work properly and they've defeated me T-T
creator: Therapon
